name: Alvarez & Marsal Holdings, LLC
h1: Alvarez & Marsal's GCC footprint in India
lede: Alvarez & Marsal runs two centers across two Indian cities. Bengaluru and New Delhi, covering SSC and GCC/GIC, built over four years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Alvarez & Marsal office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Alvarez & Marsal GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Alvarez & Marsal runs 2 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Bengaluru, New Delhi), covering SSC and GCC/GIC. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Alvarez & Marsal's India footprint covers Bengaluru and New Delhi, spanning SSC and GCC/GIC. The centers deliver Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.
